class.name: FabricMultiplayerPeer
class.brief_description: Zone-fabric multiplayer peer using ENet transport with channel-sorted messaging.
class.description: FabricMultiplayerPeer is a native [MultiplayerPeer] subclass that wraps ENet and adds zone-to-zone networking. It provides three logical communication channels: - [b]CH_MIGRATION (0)[/b]: Reliable ordered — STAGING migration intents between zones. - [b]CH_INTEREST (1)[/b]: Unreliable — Entity interest snapshots for culled replication. - [b]CH_PLAYER (2)[/b]: Unreliable — Player state updates. Works with [code]@rpc[/code], [MultiplayerSynchronizer], and [MultiplayerSpawner] out of the box. [codeblock] var peer := FabricMultiplayerPeer.new() peer.game_id = "my_game" peer.create_server(7447, 32) multiplayer.multiplayer_peer = peer [/codeblock]

method.name: broadcast_to_zones
method.description: Broadcasts [param data] to all connected neighbor zones on the given [param channel].

method.name: connect_to_zone
method.description: Establishes a neighbor connection to another zone server. The target zone's ENet port is computed as [code]base_port + target_zone_id[/code].

method.name: create_client
method.description: Creates a client and connects to the server at [param address]:[param port]. Returns [constant OK] on success.

method.name: create_server
method.description: Creates a server bound to [param port] with a maximum of [param max_clients] connections. Returns [constant OK] on success.

method.name: drain_channel
method.description: Returns all queued packets for [param channel] as an [Array] of [PackedByteArray], emptying the channel inbox. Call after [method MultiplayerPeer.poll].

method.name: send_to_zone
method.description: Sends [param data] to the specified [param target_zone_id] on the given [param channel] (0 = migration, 1 = interest, 2 = player).

members.member: The game identifier used by the zone fabric for topic routing.
